programme.desc: My Temple, My Sanctuary A monk from Myanmar came to Japan to build a temple for the people of his country, and he believes it is his mission to offer them a place of sanctuary and provide them with physical and mental comfort.

programme.desc: Large-Scale Logistics Facilities Experts shed light on massive logistics facilities with robust structures and advanced seismic isolation systems, making them suitable as evacuation sites.

S01 E29 — Bitter Water When a neighbor agrees to sell his property, the Cartwrights fear the loss of water rights for their cattle.
programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: Kipling's boy hero Mowgli (Sabu), lost in the jungle, is adopted by animals and taught how they talk.
programme.title: Jungle Book

programme.desc: Horrible old movies hosted by Dr. Paul Bearer direct from his home, the Tenement Castle.
programme.title: Dr. Paul Bearer's Creature Feature

programme.desc: A poor street cleaner is relentlessly bullied by the people of a small western township, but things change when a ruthless gunfighter rides into the town.
programme.title: Day of Anger

programme.desc: Poor sharecroppers, the Joads leave dust bowl Oklahoma in hope of better luck in California.
programme.title: The Grapes of Wrath

programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir at Temple Square performs songs of hope, faith and inspiration; singing sacred hymns both new and old from around the world as well as uplifting selections from the American songbook.
programme.title: Music & the Spoken Word

programme.desc: A secret agent (Anthony Eisley) and his boss (Wandisa Leigh) check a madman's sabotage of U.S. moonshots.
programme.title: Lightning Bolt

programme.desc: Supercomputer HAL 9000 guides astronauts (Keir Dullea, Gary Lockwood, William Sylvester) on a trip to find the origins of humans.
programme.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey

programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely.
programme.title: Logan's Run

programme.desc: A beautiful detective goes undercover to investigate a huge drug ring in Los Angeles.
programme.title: Get Christie Love!

programme.desc: Oscar-winning adaptation of the Broadway hit about an English professor (Rex Harrison) who teaches a cockney merchant (Audrey Hepburn) to be a lady.
programme.title: My Fair Lady

programme.desc: Incompatible friends (Bob Hope, Lucille Ball), taken for granted by their spouses, fall in love after having to spend time alone together.
programme.title: The Facts of Life

programme.desc: A drifter (John Garfield) stops at a Greek diner and helps the owner's (Cecil Kellaway) lusty wife (Lana Turner) become a widow.
programme.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice

programme.desc: A brother (Fred Astaire) and sister (Jane Powell) take their act to 1947 London. Includes Astaire's famous dance on the ceiling.
programme.title: Royal Wedding

programme.desc: Watson (Nigel Bruce) brings in Holmes (Basil Rathbone) on a case of ritual murder at the old Musgrave estate.
programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death

programme.desc: A lovesick attorney (Raymond Burr) tries to trap a murder client (Angela Lansbury) he got acquitted by arranging for her to kill him.
programme.title: Please Murder Me

programme.desc: Burlesque dancer Dixie Daisy is the prime suspect when rival dancers are found strangled with their own stage costumes. Aided by infatuated stand-up comic Biff Brannigan, Dixie must find the killer before she becomes his next victim.
programme.title: Lady of Burlesque

programme.desc: With an ambitious plan, a PR woman and a country-music bandleader turn a Texas truck driver into a rock 'n' roll star.
programme.title: Loving You

programme.desc: Two vaudeville flops (Bing Crosby, Bob Hope) pose as bad guys and join the Klondike gold rush with a saloon singer (Dorothy Lamour).
programme.title: Road to Utopia

programme.desc: The first manned flight to Mars is a flop, so a space official (Hal Holbrook) fakes it Hollywood-style for the public.
programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.desc: An outstanding jazz score highlights this tale of two American musicians in Paris whose lives are changed by tourists.

In the wake of the Portuguese Inquisition, on April 19, 1506, a three-day-long massacre led to the slaughter of 3,000 Jews in Lisbon. The fires shot as high as houses, in a city filled with quartered bodies and heads paraded on the points of spears.
programme.title: 1506 - The Lisbon Genocide

programme.desc: Exploring the abduction of 2,000 Jewish children in Portugal following their expulsion from Spain and arrival in Portugal in 1492, an unresolved chapter that still haunts the Jewish community today. Produced by the Jewish Community of Porto.
programme.title: 2,000 Kidnapped Jewish Children

programme.desc: In 1896 a Portuguese army captain founds the Jewish community of Oporto in northern Portugal.
programme.title: Sefarad

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: Focus On The Family

Every episode of the Focus on the Family Christian podcast helps you confidently guide your loved ones through the unique challenges faced by today’s Christian families. With over 40 years of trusted, compassionate stories of redemption, hosts Jim Daly and John Fuller connect you to biblically sound marriage and parenting help that is relatable, practical, and interesting. Listen/Learn/Apply/ThriveInChrist!

programme.title: Life In Christ With Pastor Joe Spence
Affirmations for Positive Thinking
programme.desc: Let this program lift up your day. Write down the positive affirmations and repeat them throughout the day. Positive affirmations require regular practice if you want to make lasting, long-term changes to the ways that you think and feel. The good news is that the practice and popularity of positive affirmations are based on widely accepted and well-established psychological theory.

programme.title: Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

programme.title: 2026 Make it your Best
programme.desc: Welcome to 2026 — a new chapter, not because the calendar has changed, but because you have the opportunity to choose differently. programme.title: 2026 Year of Spiritual Alignment
programme.desc: In this Life Coaching Session we delve into the deeper currents of your being. This is an invitation into stillness, a chance to realign with your true purpose and inner wisdom. Let's connect with what truly nourishes your spirit. Our core message right now is about trusting your inner compass. It is about understanding that you are always guided and supported, even when the path ahead seems unclear. Your spiritual journey is unique.

programme.title: Christian Coaching Session on New Beginnings-for-2026
programme.desc: This Christian life coaching session is rooted in biblical themes of new beginnings and God’s constant presence. The video offers calm guidance, spiritual encouragement, and practical life-coaching reflections to help you let go of the past and invite God into your everyday life. If you’re feeling stuck, tired, or uncertain about the future, this session is designed to bring reassurance, clarity, and hope — reminding you that you don’t have to walk your journey alone. Life coaching is a practical goal-setting process, and when supported by faith and spirituality, it has the power unimaginable.
